scripts.wasm-wrapper:build: npm run shared:build && npm --workspace @world-forge/wasm-engine run build
scripts.wasm-wrapper:typecheck: npm run shared:build && npm --workspace @world-forge/wasm-engine run typecheck
scripts.verify: npm run shared:build && npm run shared:test && npm run wasm-wrapper:build && npm run wasm-wrapper:test && npm run web:build && npm run web:test && npm run api:test && npm run infra:config
scripts.verify:release: npm run wasm:build && npm run verify && npm run api:build
